description:
Legal record (#3) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f.1r-v of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Dated 12 Shevat 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE.

(Document #3) Partnership dissolution and release agreement between Yehuda Carmona and Yedīdya שימו (Shemo/Shemu/Semo/Cemo/Cimo). The language of origin for the latter surname is unknown and could be Hebrew (an erratic spelling of שמו) or, more likely, Judaeo-Romance. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
